output.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  wd:Q18756 wdt:P1545 ?season .
  ?season rdfs:label ?seasonLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?seasonLabel) = 'en' &&(CONTAINS(STR(?seasonLabel) , '2023-2024') || CONTAINS(STR(?seasonLabel) , '2023–2024') || CONTAINS(STR(?seasonLabel) , '2023/2024')))
  .
  ?season wdt:P361 ?round .
  ?round rdfs:label ?roundLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?roundLabel) = 'en' &&(CONTAINS(STR(?roundLabel) , 'Quarter-finals') || CONTAINS(STR(?roundLabel) , 'Quarterfinals') || CONTAINS(STR(?roundLabel) , 'Round of 8')))
  .
  ?round wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(datatype(?date) = xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?date)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The quarter-finals of the 2023–2024 UEFA Champions League are scheduled to start on March 12, 2024. However, this date has not yet been added to Wikidata as it is a future event.
